title: hieracium flagelliferum subsp. joratense
intro: Hieracium flagelliferum subsp. joratense, also known as Jorat's hawkweed, is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as gastrointestinal issues and skin problems, and its herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, are believed to have therapeutic effects. However, more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
